basic_details.job_title: ICMR NITHR Project Technical Suppor III Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute for Tribal Health Research
basic_details.short_information: The ICMR National Institute for Tribal Health Research (ICMR NITHR) has officially announced the Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening under Advertisement No. 03/2026-27. Candidates who are up to 35 years of age and hold a three-year Graduate degree in the relevant subject/ field with three years of post-qualification experience or a Postgraduate degree in the relevant subject/ field are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 22 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and walkin details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC Category Candidates

qualification.education_qualification: Three years (03) graduate degree relevant subject /field + three years post qualification experience or PG in relevant subject/field

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICMR-NITHR Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR-NITHR Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICMR NITHR Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR-NITHR Project Technical Support – III?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 22nd July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Project Technical Support – III?
faq.answer: Candidates need a three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject/field with three years of post-qualification experience, or a PG degree in a relevant subject/field.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support – III post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC category candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support – III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 28,000/- per month, plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this job?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ICMR-NITHR office in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contract-based job as per the notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 03/2026-27.
